name: Tuna Salad Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 7 oz cans tuna in oil, drained and flaked
1 10.75 oz can cream of celery soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except 1/4 cup of the crushed potato chips in a bowl.
2. Stir well to ensure even distribution.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased Crock-Pot.
4. Top with the reserved crushed potato chips.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 5 to 8 hours.
6. Serve 4 people.
